policy: Evaluation-only. Public facts and manual reviews must not be injected as hidden target-agent context.

quality_gate.en: Fail means the output should not be used as the final demo script without review.
quality_gate.zh: fail 表示该输出不应未经复核直接作为最终 demo 解说稿。

human_review_notes.en: Opening and entrance shots should introduce the match, teams, and visible ceremony context when evidence is available.
human_review_notes.zh: 入场和开场画面应在证据充分时适当介绍比赛、球队和可见仪式背景。

human_review_notes.en: Distinguish mascots, player escorts, referees, assistant referees, fourth officials, and VAR-room officials instead of collapsing them into one role.
human_review_notes.zh: 区分吉祥物、球童、主裁、边裁、第四官员和视频助理裁判，不能混成一个角色。

human_review_notes.en: Lineup, referee, shirt number, kit color, and goalkeeper color graphics can enrich background facts, but must remain uncertain when substitutions or unclear shots break the mapping.
human_review_notes.zh: 球员列表、裁判信息、号码、队服颜色和门将颜色可作为背景知识，但替补和模糊画面会破坏对应关系，必须保留不确定性。

human_review_notes.en: Before kickoff, entrance, lineup, anthem, ceremony, and broadcast graphics are context phases, not fouls, restarts, or repeated kickoffs.
human_review_notes.zh: 开球前的入场、列队、国歌、仪式和转播图表属于背景阶段，不应识别为犯规、任意球或重复开球。

human_review_notes.en: Raw visual descriptions are not always playable commentary; color/position observations should be converted into natural broadcast wording.
human_review_notes.zh: 原始画面描述不一定能直接当解说词；颜色、位置等观察应转换为自然的解说表达。

human_review_notes.en: Names, teams, scores, referees, and event results must be organized as facts with evidence status instead of being asserted from weak visual guesses.
human_review_notes.zh: 姓名、球队、比分、裁判和事件结果应整理为带证据状态的事实，而不是从弱视觉猜测中直接断言。

recommendations.en: Reject or manually review any final output with wrong teams, excessive goal count, or unverified score-changing claims.
recommendations.zh: 最终输出若出现错误球队、进球数明显过多、未经验证的比分变化，应拒绝或转人工复核。

recommendations.en: A goal claim must be supported by live scoring evidence plus a previous/post scoreboard state, or remain pending/uncertain.
recommendations.zh: 进球宣称必须有现场进球证据和前后比分牌状态支撑，否则保持 pending/uncertain。

recommendations.en: Hard-block team names outside Germany and Curacao for this match unless they appear in explicit broadcast metadata.
recommendations.zh: 本场应硬性禁止德国、库拉索以外的球队名，除非它们出现在明确转播元数据中。

recommendations.en: Use team, role, jersey number, or verified name; avoid default color-shirt subjects.
recommendations.zh: 优先使用球队、角色、号码或已验证姓名，不要默认用球衣颜色当主语。

recommendations.en: Before kickoff, classify entrance, lineup, anthem, officials, mascots/children, and broadcast graphics as context, not fouls or restarts.
recommendations.zh: 开球前应识别入场、列队、国歌、裁判、球童/吉祥物和转播图表为背景，不应误判为犯规或重复开球。

recommendations.en: Run a lightweight Chinese linter to remove mixed English fragments and template-like wording.
recommendations.zh: 增加轻量中文润色检查，去除英文残留和模板化表达。

recommendations.en: Store extracted facts with source, confidence, validity window, and evidence frame IDs so later commentary can cite or avoid them.
recommendations.zh: 将抽取事实按来源、置信度、有效时间段和证据帧记录，便于后续解说引用或规避。
